summary: Run 3, iteration 1: All four reviewers scored 9/10 and approved. Revision 2 successfully resolved the sole Run 2 blocker (PO-B-01: Phase 0 baseline metrics) -- confirmed by all reviewers. The proposal demonstrates verified audit data, sound additive ServiceResult migration, service-layer error broadcasting for deduplication, mature 8-phase rollout with MVP cut-line, and comprehensive Section 11 cataloguing all 56 prior-run issues as implementation guidance. One new blocker emerged: UX-B-01 (no success feedback specification for mutation operations). This is a genuine gap -- the proposal exhaustively specifies error/degraded/retry states but omits success confirmation for save/create/delete in a financial app. 28 non-blocking issues across reviewers are implementation-phase refinements. Score trajectory: 7.75 (Run 1) -> 9.0 (Run 2) -> 9.0 (Run 3). Blocker trajectory: 10 -> 1 -> 1 (new blocker, prior resolved).

required_changes.title: No success feedback specification for mutation operations (save, create, delete)
required_changes.description: The proposal thoroughly specifies error states, degraded states, and retry recovery, but omits success feedback for the primary happy-path operations. AddGoalView, EditGoalView, and AddTransactionView all dismiss silently on save success with no visual confirmation. Section 5.3 animation table defines error-to-loaded transitions with a 1.5s green success banner, but this only applies to retry recovery, not to primary create/save/delete operations. For a financial app where users are saving money toward goals, confirming 'your goal was created' or 'your transaction was recorded' is a trust signal. The proposal should define whether mutation operations show a success toast/banner or whether silent dismissal is the intentional pattern, and if so, why.
required_changes.suggestion: Add Section 5.21 'Mutation Success Feedback' specifying: (a) Save/create operations that dismiss a modal show a brief success banner on the parent screen after dismissal (e.g., 'Goal created' on GoalsListView, 'Transaction saved' on AssetDetailView), using the same green success banner from Section 5.3 with 1.5s auto-dismiss (3s with VoiceOver). (b) Delete operations show confirmation inline before navigating back. (c) Haptic: UINotificationFeedbackGenerator.notification(.success) on save completion. This reuses the existing success banner spec and closes a notable gap in the user journey. If silent dismissal is intentional, document the rationale.

recurring_themes.theme: Success feedback and success banner component underspecified
recurring_themes.description: UX flagged absent mutation success feedback as the sole blocker. UI independently flagged the scattered and underspecified success banner treatment (no dedicated visual spec, not in Appendix E). UX also flagged VoiceOver timing (1.5s too fast). These converge on the same gap: the proposal fully specifies failure states but not success states.
recurring_themes.recommended_resolution: Add Section 5.21 defining mutation success feedback. Define success banner component tokens (AccessibleColors.success/successBackground, checkmark.circle.fill, .subheadline.semibold, 1.5s/3s VoiceOver auto-dismiss). Add row to Appendix E. Specify which mutation operations show success banners on parent screen.

recurring_themes.theme: CoalescedErrorBannerView is highest-complexity deliverable -- MVP fallback preferred
recurring_themes.description: PO recommends defaulting to stacked ErrorBannerView MVP. UI flags 400pt max height as excessive on compact devices (50-70% of iPhone SE screen). UX suggests raising collapse threshold from 2 to 3 (iOS convention).
recurring_themes.recommended_resolution: Default to stacked ErrorBannerView MVP. Only build full CoalescedErrorBannerView if Phase 3.5 demo validates. If built, use proportional max height (40% available) and collapse threshold of 3.

recurring_themes.theme: macOS platform behavioral differences insufficiently guarded
recurring_themes.description: UINotificationFeedbackGenerator is iOS-only with no macOS equivalent specified. Pull-to-refresh behavior differs on macOS. Both need PlatformCapabilities guards.
recurring_themes.recommended_resolution: Wrap haptic calls in PlatformCapabilities check. On macOS use NSHapticFeedbackManager or skip. Provide explicit macOS toolbar Refresh button.

recurring_themes.theme: Specification accuracy issues in reference tables
recurring_themes.description: errorBackground token exists at AccessibleColors.swift line 111 but proposal still uses conditional 'if needed' language. Appendix E ErrorBannerView typography incorrect (.caption title vs actual .subheadline.semibold). 12pt font instances (3 in OnboardingStepViews) have no mapping target in Section 5.7.
recurring_themes.recommended_resolution: Remove conditional language for errorBackground. Fix Appendix E to .subheadline.semibold title, .caption message, .caption2 suggestion. Add 12pt -> .caption2 row.

recurring_themes.theme: T2+T3 concurrent stacking and animation edge cases
recurring_themes.description: T2 banner + T3 freshness indicator stacking order acknowledged in Section 11 but not formally in spec body (4 screens affected). Dual spinner ambiguity during degraded retry. No animation spec for initial-load-into-degraded when cache loads and refresh fails immediately.
recurring_themes.recommended_resolution: Add stacking rule to Section 5.14 (banner above indicator, 8pt spacing, slide-up on dismiss). Use banner retry spinner only. Add 0.15s delay before degraded banner on initial load.

recurring_themes.theme: Effort estimate variance and Phase 3.5 iteration budget risk
recurring_themes.description: 37% effort variance (24.5-33.5h). Phase 3.5 iteration could push cumulative hours past 14, triggering premature MVP cut-line and losing Phase 4 view integration scope.
recurring_themes.recommended_resolution: Re-estimate after Phase 3.5 using actual velocity. Consider adjusting MVP cut-line trigger from hour 14 to hour 16 to absorb one demo iteration.

recurring_themes.theme: Onboarding edge cases and post-onboarding flag lifecycle
recurring_themes.description: Post-onboarding transient flag can resurrect days later if user deletes their only goal. Reassurance copy ('Your savings are safe') unhelpful for new users with $0. Post-onboarding empty state buttons need adaptive layout for Dynamic Type.
recurring_themes.recommended_resolution: Add 24h TTL to transient flag. Vary reassurance copy by portfolio state. Add ViewThatFits HStack->VStack reflow rule for buttons.

recurring_themes.description: ServiceResult default extension bridge maps all non-AppError exceptions to .networkUnavailable (semantically incorrect for local errors). DashboardErrorAggregator ownership model unspecified (child of ViewModel, sibling in DI, or @StateObject).
recurring_themes.recommended_resolution: Add AppLog.warning in generic catch branch to surface adoption gaps. Specify DashboardErrorAggregator as stored property of DashboardViewModel created in init.

decision_rationale: All 4 reviewers scored 9/10 and explicitly approved. The prior run's blocker (PO-B-01) is confirmed resolved by all reviewers. One new blocker (UX-B-01) emerged -- a legitimate gap in mutation success feedback specification for a financial app. This is a focused, well-scoped addition (new Section 5.21 reusing existing success banner patterns). The proposal is otherwise implementation-ready. A Revision 3 addressing UX-B-01 should pass without further review cycle if it follows the reviewer's suggestion (reuse Section 5.3 success banner spec, define per-mutation-type feedback, specify VoiceOver timing).

reviewer_scores.key_finding: All core source code claims independently verified. Additive ServiceResult migration is architecturally sound.
Phase 0 baseline recording resolves sole Run 2 blocker. MVP cut-line and 6-PR merge strategy well-structured.
Component visual specs are implementation-ready. errorBackground token already exists. Success banner needs dedicated spec.
Sole blocker: no success feedback for mutations. All proposal code-level claims verified. Error tier decisions correct.

all_non_blocking_issues.title: ServiceResult default extension maps non-AppError to .networkUnavailable
DashboardErrorAggregator ownership model unspecified
Effort estimate variance remains wide at 37%
CoalescedErrorBannerView should default to MVP fallback posture
Phase 3.5 iteration budget could trigger premature MVP cut-line
Manual test matrix gates underspecified for Phase 5 and Phase 6 PRs
Onboarding font remediation lacks quantitative visual regression pass/fail criteria
No production data validates P0 severity ranking for silent failures
errorBackground token already exists -- remove conditional language
AsyncContentView degraded banner should explicitly require AccessibleColors tokens
CoalescedErrorBannerView 400pt max height excessive on compact devices
Success banner component needs dedicated visual specification
T2+T3 concurrent stacking rule not formally in spec body
Appendix E ErrorBannerView typography values incorrect vs source
12pt font instances lack explicit semantic mapping target
Post-onboarding failure empty state buttons need adaptive layout spec
Degraded-to-loading dual spinner ambiguity during retry
Pull-to-refresh unreachable on T1 full-screen error after retry escalation
Post-onboarding failure transient flag needs 24h TTL
CoalescedErrorBannerView collapse threshold of 2 may be premature
Success banner 1.5s auto-dismiss too fast for VoiceOver users
FreshnessIndicatorView is awareness-only with no action affordance
MonthlyExecutionView mid-flow unsynced badge accumulation at scale
Reassurance copy assumes existing portfolio context for new users
No animation spec for initial-load-into-degraded transition
Haptic feedback uses iOS-only API without macOS consideration
Phase 5 font remediation should exclude Preview files
ErrorBannerView supports only 2 visual categories for 4 error types
